name: python3-libsigscan
title: python3-libsigscan
summary: binary signature scanning library -- Python 3 bindings
description:
binary signature scanning library -- Python 3 bindings
libsigscan is a library for binary signature scanning, using simple
offset/string-based signatures.
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for libsigscan.

When validating lab setup, run `python3-libsigscan --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
